title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
